CREATE TABLE example_dict (key VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));

DECLARE dict_var ANY;
SET dict_var = DB.DBA.DICT_CREATE();

DECLARE triples ANY;
SET triples = dict_destructive_list_rnd_keys(dict_var, 2);
SELECT * FROM example_dict WHERE key IN (SELECT DISTINCT key FROM example_dict);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM example_dict WHERE key IN (SELECT key FROM example_dict LIMIT 3);
DELETE FROM example_dict WHERE key IN (SELECT key FROM example_dict WHERE value = 'value3');

DECLARE remaining_keys ANY;
SET remaining_keys = dict_destructive_list_rnd_keys(dict_var, 3);
SELECT key FROM example_dict ORDER BY key LIMIT 1;

SET dict_var = DB.DBA.DICT_CREATE();
SET dict_var = DB.DBA.DICT_ADD(dict_var, 'key6', 'value6');
